'''Sith war worms''' were [[Species/Legends|creatures]] that were used as war beasts by the [[Sith Empire/Legends|Sith Empire]] during the [[Battle of Coruscant (Great Hyperspace War)|Battle of Coruscant]] of the [[Great Hyperspace War/Legends|Great Hyperspace War]] in [[5000 BBY/Legends|5000 BBY]].

{{Creature-stub}}

*[[Tales of the Jedi – The Fall of the Sith Empire 3|''Tales of the Jedi – The Fall of the Sith Empire'' 3]]
*[[Tales of the Jedi – The Fall of the Sith Empire 4|''Tales of the Jedi – The Fall of the Sith Empire'' 4]] {{C|Appears in illusion}}
